description_long: This is a modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style, featuring large glass windows and clean, geometric lines. The front facade includes a driveway with a patterned surface, a small landscaped area, and a covered entrance. The side and rear views reveal extensive use of glass for walls and railings, as well as a spacious outdoor deck with lounge chairs and a pool. The property is surrounded by a well-maintained lawn and bordered by low, sleek fencing. The upper floor includes a rooftop terrace and additional outdoor seating areas, enhancing the open, airy feel of the design. The overall structure is composed primarily of concrete, glass, and metal, with modern landscaping elements integrated throughout.
description: A modern, two-story flat-roof bungalow with large glass windows, rooftop terrace, pool, and landscaped yard.
description_view_0: Front view shows the driveway, main entrance, landscaped area, and a portion of the rooftop terrace.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the extensive glass walls, pool area, and the open, linear layout of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the outdoor deck with lounge chairs, pool, and additional private yard space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays more glass facades, the lawn, and the seamless integration of indoor and outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass walls
